name: scorm-solver
description: A web extension that helps complete SCORM courses by injecting completion status

scripts.build:chrome: mkdir -p dist/chrome && cp manifest.json dist/chrome/ && cp -r popup.* content.js icons dist/chrome/
scripts.build:firefox: mkdir -p dist/firefox && cp manifest-firefox.json dist/firefox/manifest.json && cp -r popup.* content.js icons dist/firefox/
scripts.zip:chrome: npm run build:chrome && cd dist/chrome && zip -r ../scorm-completion-helper-chrome.zip . && cd ../..
scripts.zip:firefox: npm run build:firefox && cd dist/firefox && zip -r ../scorm-completion-helper-firefox.zip . && cd ../..
scripts.zip: npm run zip:chrome && npm run zip:firefox

author: SCORM Solver Team
